## Summary

## Required Reading

- [ ] Re-read `README.md`
- [ ] Re-read `Package.swift`
- [ ] Re-read related `atelia-kit` interfaces when shared logic is touched

## Self-Review

- [ ] The change belongs in `atelia-mac` rather than `atelia-kit`
- [ ] Local file, terminal, repository, approval, hook, automation, and extension impact were considered
- [ ] User-facing behavior is described clearly enough for review
- [ ] Follow-up work is listed or intentionally omitted
